overview: The dependency graph is straightforward: todo-api has no dependencies and must be built first as the foundation, while todo-web explicitly depends on todo-api and can only be implemented once the API contract is established. This bottom-up ordering ensures the frontend is built against a known, stable API surface and avoids mocking or placeholder integration work.

phases.name: Foundation Services
phases.description: todo-api has no dependencies and forms the entire backend foundation — it owns authentication, business logic, and data persistence. It must be implemented first so the frontend has a real API to integrate against.

components.name: todo-api
responsibilities: Handle user registration and login with bcrypt password hashing and session token issuance
Authenticate incoming requests via JWT bearer token middleware and enforce per-user data scoping
Manage CRUD operations for tasks including filtering, sorting, and completion toggling
Manage CRUD operations for categories, including transactional cleanup of task references on deletion
Expose a /health endpoint and enforce 500ms write timeouts across all mutating operations
components.architectureContext: This is the sole backend service in a two-tier architecture. It is called exclusively by todo-web over HTTP/JSON. It owns the embedded SQLite database and all business logic — no other services exist for it to call. The frontend depends on this component for every data operation, making it the critical foundation of the system.
keyConsiderations: Use modernc.org/sqlite (pure Go, no CGO) to ensure the binary compiles cleanly in the Alpine-based Docker multi-stage build without additional toolchain dependencies
Enable WAL mode on SQLite at startup to support up to 100 concurrent readers without write-blocking, which is critical for the 100-concurrent-user requirement
Session tokens must be 32 random bytes encoded as hex — avoid JWTs despite the OpenAPI spec referencing bearerFormat: JWT, as the instructions specify a DB-backed token pattern
The DELETE /categories/{id} handler must wrap the task nullification and category deletion in a single SQLite transaction to satisfy requirement 13 — any failure must roll back both operations

Apply context.WithTimeout (500ms) on every DB write call and propagate cancellation correctly; also ensure the CORS middleware handles OPTIONS preflight before the auth middleware runs to avoid 401s on preflight requests
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
  /auth/register:
    post:
      summary: Register a new user
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email, password]
              properties:
                email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                password:
                  type: string
                  minLength: 8
      responses:
        '201':
          description: User created
        '400':
          description: Validation error
        '409':
          description: Email already registered
  /auth/login:
    post:
      summary: Authenticate user
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email, password]
              properties:
                email:
                  type: string
                password:
                  type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Session token
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  token:
                    type: string
                  expires_at:
                    type: string
                    format: date-time
        '401':
          description: Invalid credentials
  /auth/logout:
    post:
      summary: Logout and terminate session
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Session terminated
  /tasks:
    get:
      summary: List tasks for authenticated user
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [all, complete, incomplete]
        - name: category_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: due_from
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date
        - name: due_to
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of tasks sorted by due date ascending
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
    post:
      summary: Create a new task
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Task created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '400':
          description: Validation error
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
  /tasks/{id}:
    get:
      summary: Get a task by ID
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Task details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
        '404':
          description: Not found
    put:
      summary: Update a task
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated task
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '400':
          description: Validation error
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
        '404':
          description: Not found
    delete:
      summary: Delete a task
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
        '404':
          description: Not found
  /tasks/{id}/toggle:
    patch:
      summary: Toggle task completion status
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated task
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
        '404':
          description: Not found
  /categories:
    get:
      summary: List all categories for authenticated user
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of categories
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
    post:
      summary: Create a category
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [name]
              properties:
                name:
                  type: string
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Category created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        '400':
          description: Validation error
        '409':
          description: Category name already exists
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
  /categories/{id}:
    put:
      summary: Rename a category
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [name]
              properties:
                name:
                  type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated category
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        '400':
          description: Validation error
        '409':
          description: Name already taken
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
        '404':
          description: Not found
    delete:
      summary: Delete a category
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted; category_id cleared from all tasks
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
        '404':
          description: Not found
components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT
  schemas:
    Task:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        user_id:
          type: string
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        category_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        due_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          nullable: true
        completed:
          type: boolean
        completed_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
    TaskInput:
      type: object
      required: [title]
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
          maxLength: 200
        description:
          type: string
          maxLength: 2000
        category_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        due_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          nullable: true
    Category:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        user_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

phases.name: Frontend Application
phases.description: todo-web depends on todo-api and is implemented second. With the API fully defined and running, the React SPA can be built against real endpoints, enabling genuine integration and accurate error-handling flows from the start.

components.name: todo-web
responsibilities: Render a client-side routed SPA with protected and public routes, redirecting unauthenticated users to /login
Manage authentication state — store and transmit bearer tokens, handle session expiry with redirect and toast messaging
Provide full task management UI including creation, inline editing, completion toggling, filtering, and deletion with confirmation
Provide category management UI including creation, inline renaming, and deletion with confirmation
Deliver visual feedback within 200ms for all user interactions and display API errors as toast/snackbar notifications
components.architectureContext: todo-web is the sole consumer of todo-api. It communicates exclusively with todo-api over HTTP/JSON using a configurable base URL (VITE_API_URL). The frontend has no direct database access or server-side logic — all business rules are enforced by the API. nginx serves the compiled static bundle and provides the SPA fallback (index.html for all routes) and its own /health endpoint.
keyConsiderations: The nginx.conf must include a `try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html` fallback for all non-asset routes to support React Router v6 direct URL access — without this, hard refreshes on /tasks or /categories return 404

VITE_API_URL must be baked into the static bundle at build time (Vite replaces import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL); ensure the Docker build passes the correct ARG/ENV so the production image points to the real API host rather than localhost

The 401 interception logic in the API client (api.ts) must be centralised — a single fetch wrapper that checks response status and triggers the logout/redirect flow — to avoid duplicating this logic across all hooks

Overdue task detection (due_date < today AND completed === false) must use the client's local date for comparison; use a stable date computed once per render cycle (not inside a loop) to avoid inconsistencies at midnight

The ConfirmDialog for task and category deletion must be implemented as a shared, reusable component; inline window.confirm() is not acceptable as it blocks the main thread and violates the 200ms feedback requirement
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo Web App (Static SPA)
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check for the web server
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
